<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>CosmoBot — Space Exploration AI</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Ask anything about space exploration, astronomy, and the cosmos." />
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>🚀</text></svg>" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ─── Design Tokens ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg-deep:       #050a13;
      --bg-card:       #0d1626;
      --bg-input:      #111d30;
      --bg-user:       #1a3a6e;
      --bg-bot:        #0d1e35;
      --border:        rgba(99, 160, 255, 0.12);
      --border-focus:  rgba(99, 160, 255, 0.45);
      --text-primary:  #e8f0ff;
      --text-secondary:#8baad4;
      --text-muted:    #4a6280;
      --accent:        #5b9cf6;
      --accent-hover:  #7ab3ff;
      --accent-glow:   rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.25);
      --chip-bg:       rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.08);
      --chip-border:   rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.22);
      --chip-hover:    rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.18);
      --error-bg:      rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.12);
      --error-border:  rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.3);
      --error-text:    #ff7b8a;
      --radius-sm:     8px;
      --radius-md:     14px;
      --radius-lg:     20px;
      --font-ui:       'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-brand:    'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-mono:     'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Cascadia Code', monospace;
      --header-h:      62px;
      --max-w:         740px;
    }

    /* ─── Reset & Base ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { height: 100%; }
    body {
      height: 100%;
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SPLASH SCREEN  (ReactBits-inspired: SplitText + BlurIn + ShinyText)
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    #splash {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      transition: opacity 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
                  transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    }
    #splash.dismiss {
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transform: scale(1.06);
    }
    #splash-canvas {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .splash-nebula {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 50%, rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.05) 0%, transparent 65%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 45% at 20% 80%, rgba(88, 28, 135, 0.14) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 80% 20%, rgba(14, 116, 144, 0.10) 0%, transparent 55%);
      animation: nebulaPulse 5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }
    @keyframes nebulaPulse {
      from { opacity: 0.6; }
      to   { opacity: 1; }
    }
    .splash-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 20px;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 40px 24px;
      user-select: none;
    }
    /* ReactBits-style: rocket pops in with spring */
    .splash-rocket {
      font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 6rem);
      display: inline-block;
      animation: rocketSpring 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) both;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 36px rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.55))
              drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.4));
    }
    @keyframes rocketSpring {
      0%   { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px) scale(0.4) rotate(-20deg); }
      60%  { transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1.08) rotate(4deg); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
    }
    /* ReactBits SplitText: letters animate in with stagger */
    .splash-title {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 9vw, 5.5rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      display: flex;
      gap: 0.04em;
      overflow: visible;
    }
    .sl {
      display: inline-block;
      animation: letterUp 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
    }
    @keyframes letterUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(50px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    /* ReactBits BlurIn: subtitle fades + unblurs */
    .splash-sub {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 2.2vw, 1.15rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 0.28em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      /* ReactBits ShinyText effect */
      background: linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        #3a5578 0%,
        #8baad4 25%,
        #dceeff 50%,
        #8baad4 75%,
        #3a5578 100%
      );
      background-size: 250% auto;
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
      animation: blurIn 0.7s ease both, shine 4s linear 1.5s infinite;
      animation-delay: 0.75s, 1.5s;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    @keyframes blurIn {
      from { opacity: 0; filter: blur(14px); transform: scale(0.95) translateY(6px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0);    transform: scale(1)    translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes shine {
      to { background-position: 250% center; }
    }
    .splash-tagline {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      animation: blurIn 0.6s ease both;
      animation-delay: 1.15s;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    /* Progress bar */
    .splash-bar {
      width: 160px;
      height: 2px;
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.12);
      border-radius: 99px;
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: blurIn 0.4s ease both;
      animation-delay: 0.9s;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    .splash-fill {
      height: 100%;
      width: 0%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent) 0%, #a78bfa 100%);
      border-radius: 99px;
    }
    .splash-skip {
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      animation: blurIn 0.5s ease both;
      animation-delay: 1.4s;
      opacity: 0;
    }

    /* ─── App wrapper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #app-wrap {
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.8s ease 0.15s;
      height: 100vh;
      height: 100dvh;
    }
    #app-wrap.show { opacity: 1; }

    /* ─── Starfield Canvas ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #starfield {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* ─── Nebula Overlay ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .nebula {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 65% 55% at 15% 85%, rgba(88, 28, 135, 0.13) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 45% at 85% 15%, rgba(14, 116, 144, 0.10) 0%, transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 45% 65% at 55% 50%, rgba(30, 58, 138, 0.07) 0%, transparent 70%);
    }

    /* ─── App Shell ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .app {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      height: 100vh;
      height: 100dvh;
    }

    /* ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .header {
      height: var(--header-h);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(5, 10, 19, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .header-inner {
      max-width: var(--max-w);
      margin: 0 auto;
      height: 100%;
      padding: 0 20px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .brand {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .brand-icon {
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      animation: bob 3s ease-in-out infinite;
      display: inline-block;
    }
    @keyframes bob {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50%       { transform: translateY(-4px); }
    }
    .brand-name {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      letter-spacing: -0.3px;
    }
    .header-right {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .brand-tagline {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* ─── Icon Button ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .icon-btn {
      width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.06);
      color: var(--text-muted);
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, color 0.18s, transform 0.12s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .icon-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.14);
      border-color: var(--border-focus);
      color: var(--accent);
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }
    .icon-btn:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

    /* ─── Chat Container ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .chat-container {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      padding: 24px 20px;
      max-width: var(--max-w);
      width: 100%;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .chat-container::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; }
    .chat-container::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .chat-container::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; }

    /* ─── Welcome State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .welcome-state {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 40px 0 24px;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .welcome-graphic {
      position: relative;
      width: 80px;
      height: 80px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .planet-emoji {
      font-size: 3.8rem;
      animation: spin-slow 20s linear infinite;
      display: inline-block;
    }
    @keyframes spin-slow {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    .star-emoji {
      position: absolute;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      animation: twinkle 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .s1 { top: 4px;  right: 2px;  animation-delay: 0s; }
    .s2 { bottom: 8px; left: 0;   animation-delay: 0.8s; }
    .s3 { top: 50%;  left: -6px;  animation-delay: 1.6s; }
    @keyframes twinkle {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.8); }
      50%       { opacity: 1;   transform: scale(1.4); }
    }
    .welcome-title {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: 1.9rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .welcome-sub {
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      max-width: 420px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      text-align: center;
    }

    /* ─── Space Fact ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .space-fact {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.07);
      border: 1px solid rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.16);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 10px 18px;
      max-width: 460px;
      line-height: 1.55;
      text-align: center;
      animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease-out both;
    }
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* ─── Suggestion Chips ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .suggestions {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 10px;
      justify-content: center;
      max-width: 560px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .chip {
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--accent);
      background: var(--chip-bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--chip-border);
      border-radius: 99px;
      padding: 7px 15px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, color 0.18s, transform 0.12s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .chip:hover {
      background: var(--chip-hover);
      border-color: var(--accent);
      color: var(--accent-hover);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }
    .chip:active { transform: translateY(0); }

    /* ─── Messages ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .messages {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 18px;
    }
    .message {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      animation: slideIn 0.22s ease-out;
    }
    @keyframes slideIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .message.user { flex-direction: row-reverse; }

    .avatar {
      width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }
    .message.user .avatar { background: var(--bg-user); border: 1px solid rgba(99,160,255,0.3); }
    .message.bot  .avatar { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); }

    /* ─── Bubble Wrap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .bubble-wrap {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      max-width: 82%;
      gap: 5px;
    }
    .message.user .bubble-wrap { align-items: flex-end; }
    .message.bot  .bubble-wrap { align-items: flex-start; }

    .bubble {
      padding: 13px 17px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      line-height: 1.65;
      word-break: break-word;
      text-align: left;
    }
    .message.user .bubble {
      background: var(--bg-user);
      border: 1px solid rgba(99,160,255,0.22);
      border-bottom-right-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .message.bot .bubble {
      background: var(--bg-bot);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-bottom-left-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }

    /* ─── Bubble Footer (timestamp + action buttons) ─────────────────────── */
    .bubble-footer {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 0 3px;
    }
    .message.user .bubble-footer { justify-content: flex-end; }
    .message.bot  .bubble-footer { justify-content: flex-start; }

    .msg-time {
      font-size: 0.67rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .copy-btn, .speak-btn {
      background: none;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      padding: 3px 7px;
      border-radius: 5px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .copy-btn:hover, .speak-btn:hover {
      color: var(--accent);
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.10);
    }
    .copy-btn.copied { color: #4ade80; }
    .speak-btn.speaking {
      color: #f59e0b;
      background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08);
    }
    @keyframes speakPulse {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50%       { opacity: 0.4; }
    }
    .speak-btn.speaking svg { animation: speakPulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }

    /* ─── Markdown Prose ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .bubble.prose p              { margin-bottom: 0.55em; }
    .bubble.prose p:last-child   { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .bubble.prose strong         { color: var(--accent-hover); font-weight: 600; }
    .bubble.prose em             { font-style: italic; color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .bubble.prose ul,
    .bubble.prose ol             { padding-left: 1.5em; margin: 0.4em 0; }
    .bubble.prose li             { margin-bottom: 0.25em; }
    .bubble.prose li::marker     { color: var(--accent); }
    .bubble.prose code           {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.83em;
      background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.18);
      border-radius: 4px;
      padding: 1px 5px;
      color: var(--accent-hover);
    }
    .bubble.prose pre            {
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 12px 14px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      margin: 0.6em 0;
    }
    .bubble.prose pre code       { background: none; border: none; padding: 0; font-size: 0.82em; color: var(--text-primary); }
    .bubble.prose h1, .bubble.prose h2, .bubble.prose h3 {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin: 0.6em 0 0.3em;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .bubble.prose h1             { font-size: 1.1em; }
    .bubble.prose h2             { font-size: 1.0em; }
    .bubble.prose h3             { font-size: 0.95em; }
    .bubble.prose blockquote     {
      border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
      padding-left: 12px;
      margin: 0.5em 0;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      font-style: italic;
    }
    .bubble.prose a              { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: underline; }

    /* ─── Typing Indicator ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .typing-bubble {
      background: var(--bg-bot);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border-bottom-left-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 14px 18px;
      display: flex;
      gap: 5px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .dot {
      width: 7px; height: 7px;
      background: var(--text-muted);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: bounceDot 1.3s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .dot:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .dot:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
    @keyframes bounceDot {
      0%, 60%, 100% { transform: translateY(0);    opacity: 0.4; }
      30%            { transform: translateY(-6px); opacity: 1;   }
    }
    .typing-label {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-left: 8px;
      font-style: italic;
    }

    /* ─── Error Bubble ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .error-bubble {
      background: var(--error-bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--error-border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border-bottom-left-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 12px 16px;
      color: var(--error-text);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    /* ─── Scroll FAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .scroll-fab {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 130px;
      right: 24px;
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(13, 22, 38, 0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      color: var(--accent);
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s, background 0.18s;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }
    .scroll-fab:hover { background: rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.15); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .scroll-fab.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform: translateY(8px); }

    /* ─── Input Area ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .input-area {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: rgba(5, 10, 19, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 14px 20px 16px;
    }
    .input-form {
      max-width: var(--max-w);
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .input-wrap {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 10px;
      background: var(--bg-input);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 10px 10px 10px 16px;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .input-wrap:focus-within {
      border-color: var(--border-focus);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);
    }
    .input-field {
      flex: 1;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      outline: none;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      font-size: 0.93rem;
      line-height: 1.5;
      resize: none;
      max-height: 140px;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .input-field::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .input-field::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    .input-field::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; }
    .send-btn {
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: none;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: white;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      transition: background 0.18s, transform 0.12s, opacity 0.18s;
    }
    .send-btn:hover   { background: var(--accent-hover); transform: scale(1.06); }
    .send-btn:active  { transform: scale(0.96); }
    .send-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

    /* ─── Input Meta Row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .input-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-top: 7px;
      padding: 0 2px;
    }
    .disclaimer { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .char-count {
      font-size: 0.70rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      flex-shrink: 0;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .char-count.warn  { color: #f59e0b; }
    .char-count.limit { color: var(--error-text); }

    /* ─── Utilities ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .hidden { display: none !important; }

    /* ─── Responsive ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .brand-tagline { display: none; }
      .welcome-title { font-size: 1.5rem; }
      .welcome-sub   { font-size: 0.88rem; }
      .bubble-wrap   { max-width: 90%; }
      .suggestions   { gap: 8px; }
      .chip          { font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 6px 12px; }
      .scroll-fab    { bottom: 120px; right: 16px; }
      .space-fact    { font-size: 0.78rem; }
      .splash-title  { font-size: clamp(2rem, 12vw, 3rem); }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SPLASH SCREEN
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div id="splash">
    <div class="splash-nebula"></div>
    <canvas id="splash-canvas"></canvas>
    <div class="splash-content">
      <div class="splash-rocket">🚀</div>
      <h1 class="splash-title" id="splash-title"></h1>
      <p class="splash-sub">Space Exploration AI</p>
      <p class="splash-tagline">Powered by LLaMA 3.3 · Groq</p>
      <div class="splash-bar">
        <div class="splash-fill" id="splash-fill"></div>
      </div>
      <span class="splash-skip">Click anywhere to skip</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
       MAIN APP
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div id="app-wrap">
    <canvas id="starfield"></canvas>
    <div class="nebula" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <div class="app">
      <!-- Header -->
      <header class="header">
        <div class="header-inner">
          <div class="brand">
            <span class="brand-icon" aria-hidden="true">🚀</span>
            <span class="brand-name">CosmoBot</span>
          </div>
          <div class="header-right">
            <span class="brand-tagline">Space Exploration AI</span>
            <button class="icon-btn hidden" id="clearBtn" title="New conversation" aria-label="Start a new conversation">
              <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 0-6.74 2.74L3 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                <path d="M3 3v5h5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <!-- Chat container -->
      <main class="chat-container" id="chatContainer">
        <!-- Welcome state -->
        <section class="welcome-state" id="welcomeState">
          <div class="welcome-graphic">
            <span class="planet-emoji">🪐</span>
            <span class="star-emoji s1">✦</span>
            <span class="star-emoji s2">✦</span>
            <span class="star-emoji s3">✦</span>
          </div>
          <h1 class="welcome-title">Explore the Universe</h1>
          <p class="welcome-sub">Ask me anything about space missions, black holes, exoplanets, rocket science, or the history of space exploration.</p>
          <div class="space-fact" id="spaceFact" aria-live="polite"></div>
          <div class="suggestions" id="suggestions">
            <button class="chip" data-q="How does a black hole form?">How does a black hole form?</button>
            <button class="chip" data-q="What is the Artemis program?">What is the Artemis program?</button>
            <button class="chip" data-q="Can humans live on Mars?">Can humans live on Mars?</button>
            <button class="chip" data-q="How far away is Proxima Centauri?">How far away is Proxima Centauri?</button>
            <button class="chip" data-q="What happened to the Voyager probes?">What happened to the Voyager probes?</button>
            <button class="chip" data-q="Explain orbital mechanics simply">Explain orbital mechanics simply</button>
          </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Messages -->
        <div class="messages" id="messages" role="log" aria-live="polite" aria-label="Conversation"></div>
      </main>

      <!-- Scroll-to-bottom FAB -->
      <button class="scroll-fab hidden" id="scrollFab" aria-label="Jump to latest message">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </button>

      <!-- Input area -->
      <footer class="input-area">
        <form class="input-form" id="inputForm" autocomplete="off">
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <textarea
              id="userInput"
              class="input-field"
              placeholder="Ask about space…"
              rows="1"
              maxlength="1000"
              aria-label="Your question"
            ></textarea>
            <button type="submit" class="send-btn" id="sendBtn" aria-label="Send message">
              <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M22 2L11 13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                <path d="M22 2L15 22L11 13L2 9L22 2Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="input-meta">
            <p class="disclaimer">CosmoBot may make mistakes — verify with NASA or ESA.</p>
            <span class="char-count" id="charCount">0 / 1000</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CDN: markdown + sanitization -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@12/marked.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3/dist/purify.min.js"></script>

  <script>
  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPLASH  — ReactBits-inspired: SplitText · BlurIn · ShinyText
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function () {
    const TITLE    = 'COSMOBOT';
    const titleEl  = document.getElementById('splash-title');
    const fillEl   = document.getElementById('splash-fill');
    const splashEl = document.getElementById('splash');
    const appWrap  = document.getElementById('app-wrap');

    /* Splash starfield */
    const sc   = document.getElementById('splash-canvas');
    const sctx = sc.getContext('2d');
    sc.width   = window.innerWidth;
    sc.height  = window.innerHeight;
    const sStars = Array.from({ length: 200 }, () => ({
      x: Math.random() * sc.width,  y: Math.random() * sc.height,
      r: Math.random() * 1.2 + 0.15, alpha: Math.random(),
      spd: Math.random() * 0.007 + 0.002, dir: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1,
    }));
    let sRAF;
    function drawSplash() {
      sctx.clearRect(0, 0, sc.width, sc.height);
      for (const s of sStars) {
        s.alpha += s.spd * s.dir;
        if (s.alpha >= 1 || s.alpha <= 0) s.dir *= -1;
        sctx.beginPath();
        sctx.arc(s.x, s.y, s.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        sctx.fillStyle = `rgba(180,210,255,${s.alpha.toFixed(3)})`;
        sctx.fill();
      }
      sRAF = requestAnimationFrame(drawSplash);
    }
    drawSplash();

    /* SplitText — staggered letter animation */
    TITLE.split('').forEach((ch, i) => {
      const span = document.createElement('span');
      span.className = 'sl';
      span.textContent = ch;
      span.style.animationDelay = `${0.12 + i * 0.07}s`;
      titleEl.appendChild(span);
    });

    /* Progress bar */
    const DURATION = 2800;
    const t0 = performance.now();
    function tickProgress(now) {
      const pct = Math.min(((now - t0) / DURATION) * 100, 100);
      fillEl.style.width = pct + '%';
      if (pct < 100) requestAnimationFrame(tickProgress);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(tickProgress);

    /* Dismiss */
    function dismiss() {
      splashEl.classList.add('dismiss');
      appWrap.classList.add('show');
      cancelAnimationFrame(sRAF);
      setTimeout(() => splashEl.remove(), 1000);
    }
    setTimeout(dismiss, DURATION);
    splashEl.addEventListener('click', dismiss, { once: true });
  })();

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MARKED SETUP
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  if (typeof marked !== 'undefined') marked.setOptions({ breaks: true, gfm: true });
  function renderMarkdown(text) {
    if (typeof marked !== 'undefined' && typeof DOMPurify !== 'undefined')
      return DOMPurify.sanitize(marked.parse(text));
    return escapeHtml(text);
  }

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTENT ARRAYS
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const SPACE_FACTS = [
    '💡 A day on Venus is longer than its year — it rotates so slowly that the Sun rises in the west.',
    '💡 The Sun accounts for 99.86% of all mass in the solar system.',
    '💡 There are more stars in the observable universe than grains of sand on all Earth\'s beaches.',
    '💡 Neutron stars are so dense that a teaspoon of their material weighs about a billion tonnes.',
    '💡 The Milky Way and Andromeda galaxies are on a collision course — expected to merge in ~4.5 billion years.',
    '💡 Sound cannot travel through the vacuum of space — space is completely silent.',
    '💡 The ISS orbits Earth once every ~90 minutes at 28,000 km/h.',
    '💡 Light from the Sun takes just over 8 minutes to reach Earth.',
    '💡 Jupiter\'s Great Red Spot is a storm wider than Earth that has raged for over 350 years.',
    '💡 Olympus Mons on Mars is the tallest volcano in the solar system — nearly 3× the height of Everest.',
    '💡 A year on Mercury is just 88 Earth days, but a day lasts 59 Earth days.',
    '💡 The James Webb Space Telescope can see light from galaxies over 13 billion light-years away.',
    '💡 Saturn would float in water — it\'s the least dense planet in our solar system.',
    '💡 The Voyager 1 probe, launched in 1977, is now over 23 billion km from Earth.',
  ];

  const LOADING_MSGS = [
    'Scanning the cosmos…', 'Consulting the stars…', 'Calculating orbital trajectory…',
    'Checking with mission control…', 'Parsing light-years of data…', 'Aligning the telescope…',
    'Decoding radio signals…', 'Checking the JWST archives…', 'Crunching astrophysics…',
    'Querying the cosmos…',
  ];

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN STARFIELD + SHOOTING STARS
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function () {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('starfield');
    const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
    let stars = [], shooting = [], frame = 0, nextShoot = 240;

    function resize() {
      canvas.width  = window.innerWidth;
      canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      const n = Math.min(Math.floor(canvas.width * canvas.height / 6000), 220);
      stars = Array.from({ length: n }, () => ({
        x: Math.random() * canvas.width,  y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
        r: Math.random() * 1.3 + 0.2,    alpha: Math.random(),
        spd: Math.random() * 0.008 + 0.003, dir: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1,
      }));
    }
    function spawnShot() {
      shooting.push({ x: Math.random()*canvas.width*0.7, y: Math.random()*canvas.height*0.45,
        vx: Math.random()*7+5, vy: Math.random()*3+1.5, len: Math.random()*110+60, alpha: 1 });
    }
    function draw() {
      frame++;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      for (const s of stars) {
        s.alpha += s.spd * s.dir;
        if (s.alpha >= 1 || s.alpha <= 0) s.dir *= -1;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(s.x, s.y, s.r, 0, Math.PI*2);
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(180,210,255,${s.alpha.toFixed(3)})`; ctx.fill();
      }
      if (frame >= nextShoot) { spawnShot(); nextShoot = frame + Math.floor(Math.random()*300+180); }
      for (let i = shooting.length-1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const ss = shooting[i], mag = Math.hypot(ss.vx, ss.vy);
        const tx = ss.x-(ss.vx/mag)*ss.len, ty = ss.y-(ss.vy/mag)*ss.len;
        const g  = ctx.createLinearGradient(ss.x, ss.y, tx, ty);
        g.addColorStop(0, `rgba(210,230,255,${ss.alpha})`);
        g.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(210,230,255,0)');
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ss.x,ss.y); ctx.lineTo(tx,ty);
        ctx.strokeStyle=g; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.stroke();
        ss.x+=ss.vx; ss.y+=ss.vy; ss.alpha-=0.019;
        if (ss.alpha<=0||ss.x>canvas.width+100||ss.y>canvas.height+100) shooting.splice(i,1);
      }
      requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
    resize(); draw();
  })();

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPACE FACT
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  function showFact() {
    const el = document.getElementById('spaceFact');
    if (el) el.textContent = SPACE_FACTS[Math.floor(Math.random() * SPACE_FACTS.length)];
  }
  showFact();

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STATE & DOM REFS
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const messages      = [];
  let   isLoading     = false;
  const welcomeState  = document.getElementById('welcomeState');
  const messagesEl    = document.getElementById('messages');
  const inputForm     = document.getElementById('inputForm');
  const userInput     = document.getElementById('userInput');
  const sendBtn       = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
  const suggestions   = document.getElementById('suggestions');
  const clearBtn      = document.getElementById('clearBtn');
  const scrollFab     = document.getElementById('scrollFab');
  const charCountEl   = document.getElementById('charCount');
  const chatContainer = document.getElementById('chatContainer');

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     INPUT LISTENERS
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  userInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
    userInput.style.height = 'auto';
    userInput.style.height = Math.min(userInput.scrollHeight, 140) + 'px';
    const len = userInput.value.length;
    charCountEl.textContent = `${len} / 1000`;
    charCountEl.classList.toggle('warn',  len > 800 && len <= 950);
    charCountEl.classList.toggle('limit', len > 950);
  });

  userInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); if (!isLoading) submitMessage(); }
  });

  inputForm.addEventListener('submit', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (!isLoading) submitMessage(); });

  suggestions.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const chip = e.target.closest('.chip');
    if (chip?.dataset.q) { userInput.value = chip.dataset.q; submitMessage(); }
  });

  clearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    messages.length = 0;
    messagesEl.innerHTML = '';
    welcomeState.classList.remove('hidden');
    clearBtn.classList.add('hidden');
    scrollFab.classList.add('hidden');
    if (window.speechSynthesis) window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    showFact();
    userInput.focus();
  });

  chatContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const d = chatContainer.scrollHeight - chatContainer.scrollTop - chatContainer.clientHeight;
    scrollFab.classList.toggle('hidden', d < 80);
  });

  scrollFab.addEventListener('click', () =>
    chatContainer.scrollTo({ top: chatContainer.scrollHeight, behavior: 'smooth' })
  );

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TEXT-TO-AUDIO  ·  Web Speech API (Sarvam.ai integration point)
     ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     TO INTEGRATE SARVAM.AI: replace the speechSynthesis block below with:

     const res = await fetch('https://api.sarvam.ai/text-to-speech', {
       method: 'POST',
       headers: {
         'api-subscription-key': 'YOUR_SARVAM_API_KEY',
         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
       },
       body: JSON.stringify({
         inputs: [plainText],
         target_language_code: 'en-IN',
         speaker: 'meera',          // or 'arvind', 'amol', etc.
         pitch: 0, pace: 1.0, loudness: 1.5,
         speech_sample_rate: 22050,
         enable_preprocessing: true,
         model: 'bulbul:v1',
       }),
     });
     const data = await res.json();
     const audio = new Audio('data:audio/wav;base64,' + data.audios[0]);
     audio.play();
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const SPEAK_ICON = `<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5"/><path d="M19.07 4.93a10 10 0 0 1 0 14.14"/><path d="M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07"/></svg>`;
  const STOP_ICON  = `<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5"/><line x1="23" y1="9" x2="17" y2="15"/><line x1="17" y1="9" x2="23" y2="15"/></svg>`;

  function speakText(plainText, btn) {
    if (!window.speechSynthesis) return;
    if (window.speechSynthesis.speaking) {
      window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
      document.querySelectorAll('.speak-btn.speaking').forEach(b => {
        b.classList.remove('speaking');
        b.innerHTML = `${SPEAK_ICON} Listen`;
      });
      return;
    }
    const utt  = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(plainText);
    utt.rate   = 0.95;
    utt.pitch  = 1.0;
    utt.lang   = 'en-US';
    btn.classList.add('speaking');
    btn.innerHTML = `${STOP_ICON} Stop`;
    const reset = () => { btn.classList.remove('speaking'); btn.innerHTML = `${SPEAK_ICON} Listen`; };
    utt.onend  = reset;
    utt.onerror = reset;
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utt);
  }

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CORE SUBMIT
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  async function submitMessage() {
    const text = userInput.value.trim();
    if (!text) return;

    welcomeState.classList.add('hidden');
    clearBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
    userInput.value = '';
    userInput.style.height = 'auto';
    charCountEl.textContent = '0 / 1000';
    charCountEl.classList.remove('warn', 'limit');

    messages.push({ role: 'user', content: text });
    appendBubble('user', text);
    const typingEl = appendTyping();
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/chat', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ messages }),
      });
      typingEl.remove();
      if (!res.ok) {
        const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        appendError(err.error || `Error ${res.status} — please try again.`);
        return;
      }
      const data  = await res.json();
      const reply = data.message;
      messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: reply });
      appendBubble('bot', reply);
    } catch {
      typingEl.remove();
      appendError('Network error — check your connection and try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     UI HELPERS
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  function setLoading(state) {
    isLoading = state;
    sendBtn.disabled   = state;
    userInput.disabled = state;
  }

  function formatTime(d) {
    return d.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  }

  const COPY_ICON  = `<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>`;
  const CHECK_ICON = `<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;

  function stripMarkdown(text) {
    return text.replace(/[#*`_~>\[\]()]/g, '').replace(/\n+/g, ' ').trim();
  }

  function appendBubble(role, text) {
    const isUser = role === 'user';
    const msg    = document.createElement('div');
    msg.className = `message ${role}`;
    const time   = formatTime(new Date());

    if (isUser) {
      msg.innerHTML = `
        <div class="avatar">👤</div>
        <div class="bubble-wrap">
          <div class="bubble">${escapeHtml(text)}</div>
          <div class="bubble-footer">
            <span class="msg-time">${time}</span>
          </div>
        </div>`;
    } else {
      const plain = stripMarkdown(text);
      msg.innerHTML = `
        <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
        <div class="bubble-wrap">
          <div class="bubble prose">${renderMarkdown(text)}</div>
          <div class="bubble-footer">
            <span class="msg-time">${time}</span>
            <button class="speak-btn" title="Listen" aria-label="Listen to response">
              ${SPEAK_ICON} Listen
            </button>
            <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy" aria-label="Copy response">
              ${COPY_ICON} Copy
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>`;

      const speakBtn = msg.querySelector('.speak-btn');
      speakBtn.addEventListener('click', () => speakText(plain, speakBtn));

      msg.querySelector('.copy-btn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const btn = msg.querySelector('.copy-btn');
        try {
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
          btn.innerHTML = `${CHECK_ICON} Copied`;
          btn.classList.add('copied');
          setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = `${COPY_ICON} Copy`; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 1800);
        } catch { /* non-HTTPS */ }
      });
    }

    messagesEl.appendChild(msg);
    scrollBottom();
    return msg;
  }

  function appendTyping() {
    const label = LOADING_MSGS[Math.floor(Math.random() * LOADING_MSGS.length)];
    const msg   = document.createElement('div');
    msg.className = 'message bot';
    msg.innerHTML = `
      <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
      <div class="bubble-wrap">
        <div class="typing-bubble">
          <span class="dot"></span><span class="dot"></span><span class="dot"></span>
          <span class="typing-label">${label}</span>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    messagesEl.appendChild(msg);
    scrollBottom();
    return msg;
  }

  function appendError(text) {
    const msg = document.createElement('div');
    msg.className = 'message bot';
    msg.innerHTML = `
      <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
      <div class="bubble-wrap">
        <div class="error-bubble"><span>⚠️</span><span>${escapeHtml(text)}</span></div>
      </div>`;
    messagesEl.appendChild(msg);
    scrollBottom();
  }

  function scrollBottom() {
    chatContainer.scrollTo({ top: chatContainer.scrollHeight, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  function escapeHtml(str) {
    return str
      .replace(/&/g,  '&')
      .replace(/</g,  '<')
      .replace(/>/g,  '>')
      .replace(/"/g,  '"')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
  }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

content.text:
No local file references — completely self-contained. Here's what was done:

---

**Changes implemented:**

**1. Intro Splash Animation (ReactBits-inspired, pure CSS/JS)**
- **SplitText** — `COSMOBOT` letters animate in one-by-one with staggered `translateY` (`.sl` class, `@keyframes letterUp`)
- **BlurIn** — subtitle "Space Exploration AI" fades in with a blur-to-clear effect (`@keyframes blurIn`)
- **ShinyText** — moving shimmer gradient on the subtitle (`@keyframes shine`)
- Rocket icon springs in with a cubic-bezier bounce (`@keyframes rocketSpring`)
- Animated progress bar fills over 2.8s, then auto-dismisses with a scale-up fade
- Click anywhere to skip; nebula glow pulses behind the stars
- Splash has its own canvas starfield that cancels when dismissed

**2. Text-to-Audio**
- Speaker button ("Listen") on every bot message bubble
- Uses `window.speechSynthesis` (Web Speech API) right now
- Click again to stop; button shows "Stop" while speaking with a pulsing SVG animation
- **Sarvam.ai integration point** is clearly commented in the `speakText()` function with the exact API call structure ready to drop in

**3. Alignment fixes**
- User and bot `bubble-wrap` now both have `align-items` set explicitly (`flex-end` / `flex-start`)
- `bubble-footer` uses `justify-content: flex-end` for user, `flex-start` for bot
- Space fact card has explicit `text-align: center`
- All bubbles have `text-align: left`

**4. Single-file consolidation**
- All CSS from `styles.css` + all JS from `app.js` are now inlined in `index.html`
- `styles.css` and `app.js` are now unused (delete when ready)
- CDN deps (marked.js, DOMPurify) remain as `<script>` tags (no change)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>CosmoBot — Space Exploration AI</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Ask anything about space exploration, astronomy, and the cosmos." />
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>🚀</text></svg>" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ─── Design Tokens ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg-deep:       #050a13;
      --bg-card:       #0d1626;
      --bg-input:      #111d30;
      --bg-user:       #1a3a6e;
      --bg-bot:        #0d1e35;
      --border:        rgba(99, 160, 255, 0.12);
      --border-focus:  rgba(99, 160, 255, 0.45);
      --text-primary:  #e8f0ff;
      --text-secondary:#8baad4;
      --text-muted:    #4a6280;
      --accent:        #5b9cf6;
      --accent-hover:  #7ab3ff;
      --accent-glow:   rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.25);
      --chip-bg:       rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.08);
      --chip-border:   rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.22);
      --chip-hover:    rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.18);
      --error-bg:      rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.12);
      --error-border:  rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.3);
      --error-text:    #ff7b8a;
      --radius-sm:     8px;
      --radius-md:     14px;
      --radius-lg:     20px;
      --font-ui:       'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-brand:    'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-mono:     'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Cascadia Code', monospace;
      --header-h:      62px;
      --max-w:         740px;
    }

    /* ─── Reset & Base ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { height: 100%; }
    body {
      height: 100%;
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SPLASH SCREEN  (ReactBits-inspired: SplitText + BlurIn + ShinyText)
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    #splash {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      transition: opacity 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
                  transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    }
    #splash.dismiss {
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transform: scale(1.06);
    }
    #splash-canvas {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .splash-nebula {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 50%, rgba(91, 156, 246, 0.05) 0%, transparent 65%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 45% at 20% 80%, rgba(88, 28, 135, 0.14) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 80% 20%, rgba(14, 116, 144, 0.10) 0%, transparent 55%);
      animation: nebulaPulse 5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }
    @keyframes nebulaPulse {
      from { opacity: 0.6; }
      to   { opacity: 1; }
    }
    .splash-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 20px;
      text-align: center;

content.text: Now I have a complete picture. The core issue is architectural — the input is a flex footer always at the very bottom, but modern chatbots (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) use a **two-state layout**: centered when empty, bottom-docked when chatting. Let me do a full layout redesign.
