  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover" />
  <title>CosmoBot — Space Exploration AI</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Ask anything about space exploration, astronomy, and the cosmos." />
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>🚀</text></svg>" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ─── Design Tokens ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg-deep:        #050a13;
      --bg-card:        #0d1626;
      --bg-input:       #0d1b2e;
      --bg-user:        #1a3a6e;
      --bg-bot:         #0b1c33;
      --border:         rgba(99,160,255,0.13);
      --border-focus:   rgba(99,160,255,0.5);
      --text-primary:   #e8f0ff;
      --text-secondary: #8baad4;
      --text-muted:     #4a6280;
      --accent:         #5b9cf6;
      --accent-hover:   #7ab3ff;
      --accent-glow:    rgba(91,156,246,0.22);
      --chip-bg:        rgba(91,156,246,0.07);
      --chip-border:    rgba(91,156,246,0.20);
      --chip-hover:     rgba(91,156,246,0.15);
      --error-bg:       rgba(220,53,69,0.12);
      --error-border:   rgba(220,53,69,0.30);
      --error-text:     #ff7b8a;
      --r-sm: 8px; --r-md: 14px; --r-lg: 20px; --r-xl: 26px;
      --font-ui:    'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-brand: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-mono:  'SF Mono','Fira Code','Cascadia Code', monospace;
      --header-h: 60px;
      --max-w:    760px;
      --px:       20px;
      --safe-b:   env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px);
    }

    /* ─── Reset ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { height: 100%; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
    body {
      height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       BACKGROUND LAYERS
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    /* ColorBends WebGL canvas lives here */
    #cb-bg {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
      background: var(--bg-deep); /* fallback while WebGL loads */
    }
    /* Starfield sits on top of ColorBends */
    #starfield {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SPLASH  (ReactBits: SplitText · BlurIn · ShinyText)
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    #splash {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 200;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      background: transparent; /* ColorBends shines through */
      transition: opacity .9s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform .9s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
    }
    #splash.dismiss { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform: scale(1.06); }
    /* dark vignette so text reads over ColorBends during splash */
    #splash::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, rgba(5,10,19,.55) 0%, rgba(5,10,19,.85) 100%);
    }
    .splash-content {
      position: relative; z-index: 1;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
      gap: 18px; text-align: center; padding: 40px 24px;
      user-select: none;
    }
    .splash-rocket {
      font-size: clamp(4rem,10vw,6.5rem); display: inline-block;
      animation: rocketSpring .9s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) both;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(91,156,246,.7)) drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(167,139,250,.5));
    }
    @keyframes rocketSpring {
      0%   { opacity:0; transform: translateY(40px) scale(.4) rotate(-20deg); }
      60%  { transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1.08) rotate(4deg); }
      100% { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
    }
    .splash-title {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem,9vw,5.5rem);
      font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .12em;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      display: flex; gap: .04em;
      text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(91,156,246,.4);
    }
    .sl { display:inline-block; animation: letterUp .55s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) both; }
    @keyframes letterUp {
      from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(48px); }
      to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    }
    .splash-sub {
      font-family: var(--font-brand);
      font-size: clamp(.85rem,2.2vw,1.15rem);
      font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .28em; text-transform: uppercase;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg,#3a5578 0%,#8baad4 25%,#dceeff 50%,#8baad4 75%,#3a5578 100%);
      background-size: 250% auto;
      -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
      animation: blurIn .7s ease both, shine 4s linear 1.5s infinite;
      animation-delay: .75s, 1.5s; opacity: 0;
    }
    @keyframes blurIn {
      from { opacity:0; filter:blur(14px); transform:scale(.95) translateY(6px); }
      to   { opacity:1; filter:blur(0);   transform:scale(1)   translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes shine { to { background-position: 250% center; } }
    .splash-tagline {
      font-size: .72rem; color: var(--text-secondary);
      letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;
      animation: blurIn .6s ease both; animation-delay: 1.15s; opacity: 0;
    }
    .splash-bar {
      width: 160px; height: 2px;
      background: rgba(91,156,246,.15); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden;
      animation: blurIn .4s ease both; animation-delay: .9s; opacity: 0;
    }
    .splash-fill { height:100%; width:0%; border-radius:99px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), #a78bfa); }
    .splash-skip {
      font-size: .68rem; color: var(--text-muted);
      animation: blurIn .5s ease both; animation-delay: 1.4s; opacity: 0;
    }

    /* ─── App wrapper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #app-wrap {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity .8s ease .15s;
      height: 100vh; height: 100dvh;
    }
    #app-wrap.show { opacity: 1; }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       APP SHELL
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .app {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      height: 100vh; height: 100dvh;
    }

    /* ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .header {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10;
      height: var(--header-h); flex-shrink: 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(5,10,19,.82);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    }
    .header-inner {
      max-width: var(--max-w); margin: 0 auto; height: 100%;
      padding: 0 var(--px);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .brand { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
    .brand-icon { font-size:1.45rem; display:inline-block; animation:bob 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes bob { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-4px)} }
    .brand-name {
      font-family:var(--font-brand); font-size:1.15rem; font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary); letter-spacing:-.3px;
    }
    .header-right { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
    .brand-tagline {
      font-size:.74rem; color:var(--text-muted);
      font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.5px; text-transform:uppercase;
    }
    .icon-btn {
      width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%;
      border:1px solid var(--border); background:rgba(91,156,246,.06);
      color:var(--text-muted); cursor:pointer;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      transition:background .18s, border-color .18s, color .18s, transform .12s; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .icon-btn:hover { background:rgba(91,156,246,.14); border-color:var(--border-focus); color:var(--accent); transform:scale(1.08); }
    .icon-btn:active { transform:scale(.96); }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       LANDING VIEW  —  welcome + input CENTERED (ChatGPT / Claude pattern)
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .landing {
      flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 20px var(--px);
      padding-bottom: max(20px, var(--safe-b));
    }
    .landing::-webkit-scrollbar { width:5px; }
    .landing::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:transparent; }
    .landing::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border); border-radius:99px; }
    .landing-body {
      width:100%; max-width:var(--max-w);
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    }
    .welcome-block {
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
      text-align:center; gap:14px; width:100%; padding-bottom:28px;
    }
    .welcome-graphic {
      position:relative; width:90px; height:90px;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    .planet-emoji { font-size:4.2rem; display:inline-block; animation:spin-slow 20s linear infinite; }
    @keyframes spin-slow { from{transform:rotate(0deg)} to{transform:rotate(360deg)} }
    .star-emoji { position:absolute; color:var(--accent); font-size:.6rem; animation:twinkle 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .s1{top:4px;right:2px;animation-delay:0s}
    .s2{bottom:8px;left:0;animation-delay:.8s}
    .s3{top:50%;left:-6px;animation-delay:1.6s}
    @keyframes twinkle { 0%,100%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(.8)} 50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.4)} }
    .welcome-title {
      font-family:var(--font-brand); font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.1rem);
      font-weight:700; color:var(--text-primary); letter-spacing:-.5px;
      text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(91,156,246,.25);
    }
    .welcome-sub {
      font-size:clamp(.88rem,2vw,.97rem); color:var(--text-secondary);
      max-width:440px; line-height:1.65;
    }
    .space-fact {
      font-size:clamp(.78rem,1.8vw,.84rem); color:var(--text-secondary);
      background:rgba(91,156,246,.06); border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,.14);
      border-radius:var(--r-md); padding:10px 18px;
      max-width:480px; line-height:1.55;
      animation:fadeUp .6s ease-out both;
    }
    @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    .suggestions {
      display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:9px; justify-content:center;
      max-width:560px; margin-top:2px;
    }
    .chip {
      font-family:var(--font-ui); font-size:.81rem; font-weight:500;
      color:var(--accent); background:var(--chip-bg);
      border:1px solid var(--chip-border); border-radius:99px;
      padding:7px 16px; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap;
      transition:background .18s, border-color .18s, color .18s, transform .12s, box-shadow .18s;
    }
    .chip:hover {
      background:var(--chip-hover); border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent-hover);
      transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(91,156,246,.18);
    }
    .chip:active { transform:translateY(0); }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SHARED INPUT FORM
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .input-form { width:100%; max-width:var(--max-w); margin:0 auto; }

    .input-wrap {
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;           /* ← centered: fixes placeholder alignment */
      gap:10px;
      background:rgba(13,27,46,.85);
      border:1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius:var(--r-xl);
      padding:11px 12px 11px 18px;
      transition:border-color .2s, box-shadow .25s;
      box-shadow:0 2px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35), 0 0 0 0 transparent;
      backdrop-filter:blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    }
    .input-wrap:focus-within {
      border-color:var(--border-focus);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow), 0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
    }
    .input-field {
      flex:1; background:transparent; border:none; outline:none;
      color:var(--text-primary); font-family:var(--font-ui);
      font-size:1rem;           /* 16px — prevents iOS auto-zoom */
      line-height:1.55; resize:none;
      min-height:24px; max-height:160px; overflow-y:auto;
      padding:0;                /* no extra padding — keeps placeholder perfectly centered */
      vertical-align:middle;
    }
    .input-field::placeholder { color:var(--text-muted); }
    .input-field::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .input-field::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border); border-radius:99px; }

    .send-btn {
      width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:50%; border:none; flex-shrink:0;
      background:var(--accent); color:#fff; cursor:pointer;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      transition:background .18s, transform .12s, box-shadow .18s;
      box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(91,156,246,.4);
    }
    .send-btn:hover  { background:var(--accent-hover); transform:scale(1.07); box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(91,156,246,.5); }
    .send-btn:active { transform:scale(.94); }
    .send-btn:disabled { opacity:.35; cursor:not-allowed; transform:none; box-shadow:none; }

    .input-meta {
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
      margin-top:8px; padding:0 4px;
    }
    .disclaimer { font-size:.7rem; color:var(--text-muted); line-height:1.4; }
    .char-count {
      font-size:.68rem; color:var(--text-muted); flex-shrink:0;
      font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; transition:color .2s;
    }
    .char-count.warn  { color:#f59e0b; }
    .char-count.limit { color:var(--error-text); }

    /* Landing input dock: give the input a bit of breathing room */
    #landingInputDock { width:100%; }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       CHAT VIEW
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .chat-view { flex:1; display:none; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; }
    .chat-view.active { display:flex; }

    .chat-scroll {
      flex:1; overflow-y:auto; overflow-x:hidden;
      padding:24px var(--px) 8px;
      overscroll-behavior-y:contain; scroll-behavior:smooth;
    }
    .chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width:5px; }
    .chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:transparent; }
    .chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border); border-radius:99px; }

    /* Messages */
    .messages { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:20px; max-width:var(--max-w); margin:0 auto; }
    .message { display:flex; gap:12px; animation:slideIn .22s ease-out; }
    @keyframes slideIn { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    .message.user { flex-direction:row-reverse; }

    .avatar {
      width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:.95rem;
    }
    .message.user .avatar { background:var(--bg-user); border:1px solid rgba(99,160,255,.3); }
    .message.bot  .avatar { background:var(--bg-card); border:1px solid var(--border); }

    .bubble-wrap { display:flex; flex-direction:column; max-width:min(82%,620px); gap:5px; }
    .message.user .bubble-wrap { align-items:flex-end; }
    .message.bot  .bubble-wrap { align-items:flex-start; }

    .bubble {
      padding:13px 17px; border-radius:var(--r-md);
      font-size:.91rem; line-height:1.68; word-break:break-word; text-align:left;
    }
    .message.user .bubble {
      background:var(--bg-user); border:1px solid rgba(99,160,255,.22);
      border-bottom-right-radius:var(--r-sm); color:var(--text-primary);
    }
    .message.bot .bubble {
      background:var(--bg-bot); border:1px solid var(--border);
      border-bottom-left-radius:var(--r-sm); color:var(--text-primary);
    }

    .bubble-footer { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:0 3px; }
    .message.user .bubble-footer { justify-content:flex-end; }
    .message.bot  .bubble-footer { justify-content:flex-start; }
    .msg-time { font-size:.65rem; color:var(--text-muted); flex-shrink:0; }

    .copy-btn,.speak-btn {
      background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer;
      color:var(--text-muted); padding:4px 8px; border-radius:6px;
      display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;
      font-size:.67rem; font-family:var(--font-ui);
      transition:color .15s, background .15s; white-space:nowrap; min-height:28px;
    }
    .copy-btn:hover,.speak-btn:hover { color:var(--accent); background:rgba(91,156,246,.10); }
    .copy-btn.copied { color:#4ade80; }
    .speak-btn.speaking { color:#f59e0b; background:rgba(245,158,11,.08); }
    @keyframes speakPulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.35} }
    .speak-btn.speaking svg { animation:speakPulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }

    /* Markdown prose */
    .bubble.prose p { margin-bottom:.55em; }
    .bubble.prose p:last-child { margin-bottom:0; }
    .bubble.prose strong { color:var(--accent-hover); font-weight:600; }
    .bubble.prose em { font-style:italic; color:var(--text-secondary); }
    .bubble.prose ul,.bubble.prose ol { padding-left:1.5em; margin:.4em 0; }
    .bubble.prose li { margin-bottom:.25em; }
    .bubble.prose li::marker { color:var(--accent); }
    .bubble.prose code {
      font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:.82em;
      background:rgba(91,156,246,.1); border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,.18);
      border-radius:4px; padding:1px 5px; color:var(--accent-hover);
    }
    .bubble.prose pre {
      background:rgba(0,0,0,.5); border:1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius:var(--r-sm); padding:12px 14px; overflow-x:auto; margin:.6em 0;
    }
    .bubble.prose pre code { background:none; border:none; padding:0; font-size:.82em; color:var(--text-primary); }
    .bubble.prose h1,.bubble.prose h2,.bubble.prose h3 {
      font-family:var(--font-brand); font-weight:700; margin:.6em 0 .3em; color:var(--text-primary);
    }
    .bubble.prose h1{font-size:1.1em} .bubble.prose h2{font-size:1em} .bubble.prose h3{font-size:.95em}
    .bubble.prose blockquote {
      border-left:3px solid var(--accent); padding-left:12px;
      margin:.5em 0; color:var(--text-secondary); font-style:italic;
    }
    .bubble.prose a { color:var(--accent); text-decoration:underline; }

    /* Typing */
    .typing-bubble {
      background:var(--bg-bot); border:1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius:var(--r-md); border-bottom-left-radius:var(--r-sm);
      padding:14px 18px; display:flex; gap:5px; align-items:center;
    }
    .dot { width:7px; height:7px; background:var(--text-muted); border-radius:50%; animation:bounceDot 1.3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .dot:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s} .dot:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s}
    @keyframes bounceDot { 0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:.4} 30%{transform:translateY(-6px);opacity:1} }
    .typing-label { font-size:.77rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-left:8px; font-style:italic; }

    /* Error */
    .error-bubble {
      background:var(--error-bg); border:1px solid var(--error-border);
      border-radius:var(--r-md); border-bottom-left-radius:var(--r-sm);
      padding:12px 16px; color:var(--error-text); font-size:.87rem;
      display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    }

    /* Chat input bar */
    .chat-input-bar {
      flex-shrink:0;
      background:rgba(5,10,19,.88);
      backdrop-filter:blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
      border-top:1px solid var(--border);
      padding:12px var(--px);
      padding-bottom:max(14px, var(--safe-b));
    }

    /* Scroll FAB */
    .scroll-fab {
      position:sticky; bottom:16px; float:right;
      width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:50%;
      border:1px solid var(--border);
      background:rgba(13,22,38,.94);
      backdrop-filter:blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
      color:var(--accent); cursor:pointer;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      transition:opacity .2s, transform .2s, background .18s;
      box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
      margin-bottom:-36px;
    }
    .scroll-fab:hover { background:rgba(91,156,246,.18); transform:translateY(-2px); }
    .scroll-fab.hidden { opacity:0; pointer-events:none; }

    /* ─── Utilities ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .hidden { display:none !important; }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       RESPONSIVE
    ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    @media (max-width: 800px)  { :root { --px: 16px; } }
    @media (max-width: 600px)  {
      :root { --px:12px; --header-h:54px; }
      .brand-tagline { display:none; }
      .welcome-title { font-size:1.4rem; }
      .welcome-sub   { font-size:.87rem; max-width:none; }
      .space-fact    { font-size:.77rem; max-width:none; }
      .suggestions   { gap:8px; }
      .chip          { font-size:.77rem; padding:6px 13px; }
      .bubble-wrap   { max-width:90%; }
      .bubble        { font-size:.88rem; padding:11px 14px; }
      .splash-title  { font-size:clamp(2rem,11vw,3rem); }
    }
    @media (max-width: 380px)  {
      .welcome-title { font-size:1.2rem; }
      .chip          { font-size:.72rem; padding:5px 11px; }
    }
    @media (max-height:500px) and (orientation:landscape) {
      .welcome-graphic { display:none; }
      .welcome-block   { gap:10px; padding-bottom:14px; }
      .landing         { justify-content:flex-start; padding-top:10px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- ColorBends background container -->
  <div id="cb-bg"></div>

  <!-- Twinkling starfield on top of ColorBends -->
  <canvas id="starfield"></canvas>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
       SPLASH
  ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div id="splash">
    <div class="splash-content">
      <div class="splash-rocket">🚀</div>
      <h1 class="splash-title" id="splash-title"></h1>
      <p class="splash-sub">Space Exploration AI</p>
      <p class="splash-tagline">Powered by LLaMA 3.3 · Groq</p>
      <div class="splash-bar"><div class="splash-fill" id="splash-fill"></div></div>
      <span class="splash-skip">Click anywhere to skip</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
       MAIN APP
  ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div id="app-wrap">
    <div class="app">

      <header class="header">
        <div class="header-inner">
          <div class="brand">
            <span class="brand-icon" aria-hidden="true">🚀</span>
            <span class="brand-name">CosmoBot</span>
          </div>
          <div class="header-right">
            <span class="brand-tagline">Space Exploration AI</span>
            <button class="icon-btn hidden" id="clearBtn" title="New conversation" aria-label="Start a new conversation">
              <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 0-6.74 2.74L3 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                <path d="M3 3v5h5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <!-- LANDING VIEW (welcome + input centered together) -->
      <div class="landing" id="landingView">
        <div class="landing-body">
          <div class="welcome-block">
            <div class="welcome-graphic">
              <span class="planet-emoji">🪐</span>
              <span class="star-emoji s1">✦</span>
              <span class="star-emoji s2">✦</span>
              <span class="star-emoji s3">✦</span>
            </div>
            <h1 class="welcome-title">Explore the Universe</h1>
            <p class="welcome-sub">Ask me anything about space missions, black holes, exoplanets, rocket science, or the history of space exploration.</p>
            <div class="space-fact" id="spaceFact" aria-live="polite"></div>
            <div class="suggestions" id="suggestions">
              <button class="chip" data-q="How does a black hole form?">How does a black hole form?</button>
              <button class="chip" data-q="What is the Artemis program?">What is the Artemis program?</button>
              <button class="chip" data-q="Can humans live on Mars?">Can humans live on Mars?</button>
              <button class="chip" data-q="How far away is Proxima Centauri?">How far away is Proxima Centauri?</button>
              <button class="chip" data-q="What happened to the Voyager probes?">What happened to the Voyager probes?</button>
              <button class="chip" data-q="Explain orbital mechanics simply">Explain orbital mechanics simply</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Input docks here in landing mode -->
          <div id="landingInputDock" style="width:100%"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CHAT VIEW (messages scroll + bottom input) -->
      <div class="chat-view" id="chatView" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="chat-scroll" id="chatContainer">
          <button class="scroll-fab hidden" id="scrollFab" aria-label="Jump to latest message">
            <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
              <path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
          </button>
          <div class="messages" id="messages" role="log" aria-live="polite" aria-label="Conversation"></div>
        </div>
        <!-- Input docks here in chat mode -->
        <div class="chat-input-bar" id="chatInputDock"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
       SHARED INPUT FORM (moved between docks by JS)
  ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <form class="input-form" id="inputForm" autocomplete="off">
    <div class="input-wrap">
      <textarea
        id="userInput" class="input-field"
        placeholder="Ask about space…"
        rows="1" maxlength="1000"
        aria-label="Your question"
      ></textarea>
      <button type="submit" class="send-btn" id="sendBtn" aria-label="Send message">
        <svg width="19" height="19" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M22 2L11 13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          <path d="M22 2L15 22L11 13L2 9L22 2Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="input-meta">
      <p class="disclaimer">CosmoBot may make mistakes — verify with NASA or ESA.</p>
      <span class="char-count" id="charCount">0 / 1000</span>
    </div>
  </form>

  <!-- CDN scripts — load Three.js before the inline script -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.160.0/build/three.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@12/marked.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3/dist/purify.min.js"></script>

  <script>
  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     COLOR BENDS  —  Vanilla JS port of the ReactBits component
     Original: https://www.reactbits.dev  (Three.js WebGL shader)
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function initColorBends() {
    if (typeof THREE === 'undefined') return; // graceful fallback

    const MAX_COLORS = 8;

    /* ── GLSL shaders (exact from ReactBits) ── */
    const VERT = `
      varying vec2 vUv;
      void main() {
        vUv = uv;
        gl_Position = vec4(position, 1.0);
      }
    `;

    const FRAG = `
      #define MAX_COLORS ${MAX_COLORS}
      uniform vec2  uCanvas;
      uniform float uTime;
      uniform float uSpeed;
      uniform vec2  uRot;
      uniform int   uColorCount;
      uniform vec3  uColors[MAX_COLORS];
      uniform int   uTransparent;
      uniform float uScale;
      uniform float uFrequency;
      uniform float uWarpStrength;
      uniform vec2  uPointer;
      uniform float uMouseInfluence;
      uniform float uParallax;
      uniform float uNoise;
      varying vec2 vUv;

      void main() {
        float t  = uTime * uSpeed;
        vec2  p  = vUv * 2.0 - 1.0;
        p += uPointer * uParallax * 0.1;
        vec2 rp = vec2(p.x*uRot.x - p.y*uRot.y, p.x*uRot.y + p.y*uRot.x);
        vec2 q  = vec2(rp.x*(uCanvas.x/uCanvas.y), rp.y);
        q /= max(uScale, 0.0001);
        q /= 0.5 + 0.2*dot(q,q);
        q += 0.2*cos(t) - 7.56;
        q += (uPointer - rp) * uMouseInfluence * 0.2;

        vec3  col   = vec3(0.0);
        float a     = 1.0;

        if (uColorCount > 0) {
          vec2  s      = q;
          vec3  sumCol = vec3(0.0);
          float cover  = 0.0;
          for (int i = 0; i < MAX_COLORS; ++i) {
            if (i >= uColorCount) break;
            s -= 0.01;
            vec2  r      = sin(1.5*(s.yx*uFrequency) + 2.0*cos(s*uFrequency));
            float m0     = length(r + sin(5.0*r.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(i))/4.0);
            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength,0.0,1.0);
            float kMix   = pow(kBelow,0.3);
            float gain   = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength-1.0,0.0);
            vec2  warped = s + (r-s)*kBelow*gain;
            float m1     = length(warped + sin(5.0*warped.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(i))/4.0);
            float m      = mix(m0,m1,kMix);
            float w      = 1.0 - exp(-6.0/exp(6.0*m));
            sumCol += uColors[i]*w;
            cover   = max(cover,w);
          }
          col = clamp(sumCol,0.0,1.0);
          a   = uTransparent > 0 ? cover : 1.0;
        } else {
          vec2 s = q;
          for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
            s -= 0.01;
            vec2  r      = sin(1.5*(s.yx*uFrequency) + 2.0*cos(s*uFrequency));
            float m0     = length(r + sin(5.0*r.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(k))/4.0);
            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength,0.0,1.0);
            float kMix   = pow(kBelow,0.3);
            float gain   = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength-1.0,0.0);
            vec2  warped = s + (r-s)*kBelow*gain;
            float m1     = length(warped + sin(5.0*warped.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(k))/4.0);
            float m      = mix(m0,m1,kMix);
            col[k] = 1.0 - exp(-6.0/exp(6.0*m));
          }
          a = uTransparent > 0 ? max(max(col.r,col.g),col.b) : 1.0;
        }

        if (uNoise > 0.0001) {
          float n = fract(sin(dot(gl_FragCoord.xy + vec2(uTime), vec2(12.9898,78.233)))*43758.5453123);
          col = clamp(col + (n-0.5)*uNoise, 0.0, 1.0);
        }

        vec3 rgb = (uTransparent > 0) ? col*a : col;
        gl_FragColor = vec4(rgb, a);
      }
    `;

    /* ── Space-themed color palette ── */
    const RAW_COLORS = [
      '#05102a',   // deep space navy
      '#0d1f6e',   // royal deep blue
      '#190850',   // space purple
      '#041e45',   // dark ocean blue
      '#0a2860',   // nebula blue
      '#0e1a55',   // indigo space
    ];

    function hexToVec3(hex) {
      const h = hex.replace('#','');
      return new THREE.Vector3(
        parseInt(h.slice(0,2),16)/255,
        parseInt(h.slice(2,4),16)/255,
        parseInt(h.slice(4,6),16)/255
      );
    }

    const container = document.getElementById('cb-bg');
    const scene     = new THREE.Scene();
    const camera    = new THREE.OrthographicCamera(-1,1,1,-1,0,1);
    const geometry  = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2,2);

    const uColorsArr = Array.from({length:MAX_COLORS}, ()=>new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0));
    RAW_COLORS.slice(0,MAX_COLORS).forEach((c,i)=>uColorsArr[i].copy(hexToVec3(c)));

    const material = new THREE.ShaderMaterial({
      vertexShader:   VERT,
      fragmentShader: FRAG,
      uniforms: {
        uCanvas:         { value: new THREE.Vector2(1,1) },
        uTime:           { value: 0 },
        uSpeed:          { value: 0.10 },
        uRot:            { value: new THREE.Vector2(1,0) },
        uColorCount:     { value: RAW_COLORS.length },
        uColors:         { value: uColorsArr },
        uTransparent:    { value: 0 },          // solid — we're the background
        uScale:          { value: 1.1 },
        uFrequency:      { value: 0.85 },
        uWarpStrength:   { value: 1.4 },
        uPointer:        { value: new THREE.Vector2(0,0) },
        uMouseInfluence: { value: 0.45 },
        uParallax:       { value: 0.18 },
        uNoise:          { value: 0.035 },
      },
      transparent: false, premultipliedAlpha: true,
    });

    scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material));

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({
      antialias: false, powerPreference:'high-performance', alpha: false,
    });
    renderer.outputColorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;
    renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio||1, 1.5)); // cap for mobile perf
    renderer.setClearColor(0x05102a, 1);
    Object.assign(renderer.domElement.style, {
      position:'absolute', top:'0', left:'0', width:'100%', height:'100%', display:'block',
    });
    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement);

    function resize() {
      const w = window.innerWidth, h = window.innerHeight;
      renderer.setSize(w, h, false);
      material.uniforms.uCanvas.value.set(w, h);
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
    resize();

    const clock  = new THREE.Clock();
    const pTgt   = new THREE.Vector2(0,0);
    const pCur   = new THREE.Vector2(0,0);
    let autoAngle = 0;

    window.addEventListener('pointermove', e => {
      pTgt.set(
        (e.clientX/window.innerWidth) *2-1,
        -((e.clientY/window.innerHeight)*2-1)
      );
    });

    function animateCB() {
      const dt = clock.getDelta();
      const el = clock.elapsedTime;
      material.uniforms.uTime.value = el;

      // Slow auto-rotation (0.25 °/s)
      autoAngle += dt * 0.25;
      const rad = autoAngle * Math.PI/180;
      material.uniforms.uRot.value.set(Math.cos(rad), Math.sin(rad));

      pCur.lerp(pTgt, Math.min(1, dt*7));
      material.uniforms.uPointer.value.copy(pCur);

      renderer.render(scene, camera);
      requestAnimationFrame(animateCB);
    }
    animateCB();
  })();

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPLASH  (ReactBits: SplitText · BlurIn · ShinyText)
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function () {
    const titleEl = document.getElementById('splash-title');
    const fillEl  = document.getElementById('splash-fill');
    const splash  = document.getElementById('splash');
    const appWrap = document.getElementById('app-wrap');

    'COSMOBOT'.split('').forEach((c,i)=>{
      const s = document.createElement('span');
      s.className='sl'; s.textContent=c;
      s.style.animationDelay=`${.12+i*.07}s`;
      titleEl.appendChild(s);
    });

    const DUR=2800, t0=performance.now();
    function tick(now) {
      const p=Math.min(((now-t0)/DUR)*100,100);
      fillEl.style.width=p+'%';
      if(p<100) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(tick);

    function dismiss() {
      splash.classList.add('dismiss');
      appWrap.classList.add('show');
      setTimeout(()=>splash.remove(), 1000);
    }
    setTimeout(dismiss, DUR);
    splash.addEventListener('click', dismiss, {once:true});
  })();

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MARKED
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  if (typeof marked!=='undefined') marked.setOptions({breaks:true,gfm:true});
  function renderMD(t) {
    if (typeof marked!=='undefined'&&typeof DOMPurify!=='undefined')
      return DOMPurify.sanitize(marked.parse(t));
    return escHtml(t);
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTENT
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const FACTS=[
    '💡 A day on Venus is longer than its year — it rotates so slowly that the Sun rises in the west.',
    '💡 The Sun accounts for 99.86% of all mass in the solar system.',
    '💡 There are more stars in the observable universe than grains of sand on all Earth\'s beaches.',
    '💡 Neutron stars are so dense that a teaspoon of their material weighs about a billion tonnes.',
    '💡 The Milky Way and Andromeda are on a collision course — expected to merge in ~4.5 billion years.',
    '💡 Sound cannot travel through the vacuum of space — it is completely silent.',
    '💡 The ISS orbits Earth once every ~90 minutes at 28,000 km/h.',
    '💡 Light from the Sun takes just over 8 minutes to reach Earth.',
    '💡 Jupiter\'s Great Red Spot has raged for over 350 years and is wider than Earth.',
    '💡 Olympus Mons on Mars is nearly 3× the height of Everest — tallest volcano in the solar system.',
    '💡 A year on Mercury is just 88 Earth days, but a day lasts 59 Earth days.',
    '💡 The James Webb Space Telescope can see galaxies over 13 billion light-years away.',
    '💡 Saturn would float in water — it\'s the least dense planet in our solar system.',
    '💡 Voyager 1, launched in 1977, is now over 23 billion km from Earth.',
  ];
  const LOADS=[
    'Scanning the cosmos…','Consulting the stars…','Calculating orbital trajectory…',
    'Checking with mission control…','Parsing light-years of data…','Aligning the telescope…',
    'Decoding radio signals…','Checking the JWST archives…','Crunching astrophysics…',
    'Querying the cosmos…',
  ];

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STARFIELD + SHOOTING STARS  (on top of ColorBends)
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function(){
    const cv=document.getElementById('starfield'), cx=cv.getContext('2d');
    let stars=[],shots=[],frame=0,nextShot=240;
    function resize(){
      cv.width=window.innerWidth; cv.height=window.innerHeight;
      const n=Math.min(Math.floor(cv.width*cv.height/6000),220);
      stars=Array.from({length:n},()=>({
        x:Math.random()*cv.width, y:Math.random()*cv.height,
        r:Math.random()*1.3+.2, a:Math.random(),
        s:Math.random()*.008+.003, d:Math.random()>.5?1:-1
      }));
    }
    function draw(){
      frame++; cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
      for(const p of stars){
        p.a+=p.s*p.d; if(p.a>=1||p.a<=0)p.d*=-1;
        cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
        cx.fillStyle=`rgba(200,225,255,${p.a.toFixed(3)})`; cx.fill();
      }
      if(frame>=nextShot){
        shots.push({x:Math.random()*cv.width*.7,y:Math.random()*cv.height*.45,
          vx:Math.random()*7+5,vy:Math.random()*3+1.5,len:Math.random()*110+60,a:1});
        nextShot=frame+Math.floor(Math.random()*300+180);
      }
      for(let i=shots.length-1;i>=0;i--){
        const sh=shots[i],m=Math.hypot(sh.vx,sh.vy);
        const tx=sh.x-(sh.vx/m)*sh.len,ty=sh.y-(sh.vy/m)*sh.len;
        const g=cx.createLinearGradient(sh.x,sh.y,tx,ty);
        g.addColorStop(0,`rgba(210,230,255,${sh.a})`);
        g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(210,230,255,0)');
        cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(sh.x,sh.y); cx.lineTo(tx,ty);
        cx.strokeStyle=g; cx.lineWidth=1.5; cx.stroke();
        sh.x+=sh.vx; sh.y+=sh.vy; sh.a-=.019;
        if(sh.a<=0||sh.x>cv.width+100||sh.y>cv.height+100)shots.splice(i,1);
      }
      requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize',resize);
    resize(); draw();
  })();

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPACE FACT
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  function showFact(){
    const el=document.getElementById('spaceFact');
    if(el) el.textContent=FACTS[Math.floor(Math.random()*FACTS.length)];
  }
  showFact();

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     DOM REFS & LAYOUT STATE
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const landingView   = document.getElementById('landingView');
  const chatView      = document.getElementById('chatView');
  const landingDock   = document.getElementById('landingInputDock');
  const chatDock      = document.getElementById('chatInputDock');
  const inputForm     = document.getElementById('inputForm');
  const messagesEl    = document.getElementById('messages');
  const userInput     = document.getElementById('userInput');
  const sendBtn       = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
  const suggestions   = document.getElementById('suggestions');
  const clearBtn      = document.getElementById('clearBtn');
  const scrollFab     = document.getElementById('scrollFab');
  const charCountEl   = document.getElementById('charCount');
  const chatContainer = document.getElementById('chatContainer');

  // Initial placement: form in landing dock
  landingDock.appendChild(inputForm);

  let inChat = false;

  function enterChat() {
    if (inChat) return;
    inChat = true;
    landingView.classList.add('hidden');
    chatView.classList.add('active');
    chatView.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
    chatDock.appendChild(inputForm);
    clearBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
    userInput.focus();
  }

  function returnToLanding() {
    inChat = false;
    messages.length = 0;
    messagesEl.innerHTML = '';
    chatView.classList.remove('active');
    chatView.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    landingView.classList.remove('hidden');
    landingDock.appendChild(inputForm);
    clearBtn.classList.add('hidden');
    scrollFab.classList.add('hidden');
    if (window.speechSynthesis) window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    showFact();
    userInput.focus();
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     INPUT LISTENERS
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  userInput.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
    userInput.style.height='auto';
    userInput.style.height=Math.min(userInput.scrollHeight,160)+'px';
    const len=userInput.value.length;
    charCountEl.textContent=`${len} / 1000`;
    charCountEl.classList.toggle('warn', len>800&&len<=950);
    charCountEl.classList.toggle('limit',len>950);
  });

  userInput.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{
    if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();if(!isLoading)submitMsg();}
  });

  inputForm.addEventListener('submit', e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!isLoading)submitMsg();});

  suggestions.addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const chip=e.target.closest('.chip');
    if(chip?.dataset.q){userInput.value=chip.dataset.q;submitMsg();}
  });

  clearBtn.addEventListener('click', returnToLanding);

  chatContainer.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
    const d=chatContainer.scrollHeight-chatContainer.scrollTop-chatContainer.clientHeight;
    scrollFab.classList.toggle('hidden',d<100);
  });
  scrollFab.addEventListener('click', ()=>
    chatContainer.scrollTo({top:chatContainer.scrollHeight,behavior:'smooth'})
  );

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TEXT-TO-AUDIO  ·  Web Speech API
     ── Sarvam.ai integration point ──────────────────────────────────────
     When ready, replace the speechSynthesis block with:

     const res = await fetch('https://api.sarvam.ai/text-to-speech', {
       method:'POST',
       headers:{'api-subscription-key':'YOUR_KEY','Content-Type':'application/json'},
       body: JSON.stringify({
         inputs:[plainText], target_language_code:'en-IN',
         speaker:'meera', pitch:0, pace:1.0, loudness:1.5,
         speech_sample_rate:22050, enable_preprocessing:true, model:'bulbul:v1',
       }),
     });
     const { audios } = await res.json();
     new Audio('data:audio/wav;base64,' + audios[0]).play();
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const I_SPEAK=`<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5"/><path d="M19.07 4.93a10 10 0 0 1 0 14.14"/><path d="M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07"/></svg>`;
  const I_STOP =`<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5"/><line x1="23" y1="9" x2="17" y2="15"/><line x1="17" y1="9" x2="23" y2="15"/></svg>`;
  const I_COPY =`<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>`;
  const I_CHECK=`<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;

  function speakText(plain,btn){
    if(!window.speechSynthesis) return;
    if(window.speechSynthesis.speaking){
      window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
      document.querySelectorAll('.speak-btn.speaking').forEach(b=>{
        b.classList.remove('speaking'); b.innerHTML=`${I_SPEAK} Listen`;
      });
      return;
    }
    const utt=new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(plain);
    utt.rate=.95; utt.pitch=1; utt.lang='en-US';
    btn.classList.add('speaking'); btn.innerHTML=`${I_STOP} Stop`;
    const reset=()=>{ btn.classList.remove('speaking'); btn.innerHTML=`${I_SPEAK} Listen`; };
    utt.onend=reset; utt.onerror=reset;
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utt);
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CORE STATE + SUBMIT
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const messages=[];
  let   isLoading=false;

  async function submitMsg(){
    const text=userInput.value.trim(); if(!text) return;
    enterChat();
    userInput.value=''; userInput.style.height='auto';
    charCountEl.textContent='0 / 1000'; charCountEl.classList.remove('warn','limit');
    messages.push({role:'user',content:text});
    appendBubble('user',text);
    const typEl=appendTyping();
    setLoading(true);
    try{
      const res=await fetch('/api/chat',{
        method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({messages}),
      });
      typEl.remove();
      if(!res.ok){ const e=await res.json().catch(()=>({})); appendError(e.error||`Error ${res.status}`); return; }
      const {message:reply}=await res.json();
      messages.push({role:'assistant',content:reply});
      appendBubble('bot',reply);
    } catch{ typEl.remove(); appendError('Network error — check your connection and try again.'); }
    finally{ setLoading(false); }
  }

  function setLoading(s){ isLoading=s; sendBtn.disabled=s; userInput.disabled=s; if(!s) userInput.focus(); }
  function fmtTime(d){ return d.toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}); }
  function stripMD(t){ return t.replace(/[#*`_~>\[\]()]/g,'').replace(/\n+/g,' ').trim(); }

  function appendBubble(role,text){
    const isUser=role==='user';
    const msg=document.createElement('div');
    msg.className=`message ${role}`;
    const time=fmtTime(new Date());
    if(isUser){
      msg.innerHTML=`
        <div class="avatar">👤</div>
        <div class="bubble-wrap">
          <div class="bubble">${escHtml(text)}</div>
          <div class="bubble-footer"><span class="msg-time">${time}</span></div>
        </div>`;
    } else {
      const plain=stripMD(text);
      msg.innerHTML=`
        <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
        <div class="bubble-wrap">
          <div class="bubble prose">${renderMD(text)}</div>
          <div class="bubble-footer">
            <span class="msg-time">${time}</span>
            <button class="speak-btn">${I_SPEAK} Listen</button>
            <button class="copy-btn">${I_COPY} Copy</button>
          </div>
        </div>`;
      const spk=msg.querySelector('.speak-btn');
      spk.addEventListener('click',()=>speakText(plain,spk));
      msg.querySelector('.copy-btn').addEventListener('click',async()=>{
        const btn=msg.querySelector('.copy-btn');
        try{
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
          btn.innerHTML=`${I_CHECK} Copied`; btn.classList.add('copied');
          setTimeout(()=>{btn.innerHTML=`${I_COPY} Copy`;btn.classList.remove('copied');},1800);
        } catch{}
      });
    }
    messagesEl.appendChild(msg); scrollBottom(); return msg;
  }

  function appendTyping(){
    const lbl=LOADS[Math.floor(Math.random()*LOADS.length)];
    const msg=document.createElement('div');
    msg.className='message bot';
    msg.innerHTML=`
      <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
      <div class="bubble-wrap">
        <div class="typing-bubble">
          <span class="dot"></span><span class="dot"></span><span class="dot"></span>
          <span class="typing-label">${lbl}</span>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    messagesEl.appendChild(msg); scrollBottom(); return msg;
  }

  function appendError(text){
    const msg=document.createElement('div');
    msg.className='message bot';
    msg.innerHTML=`
      <div class="avatar">🚀</div>
      <div class="bubble-wrap">
        <div class="error-bubble"><span>⚠️</span><span>${escHtml(text)}</span></div>
      </div>`;
    messagesEl.appendChild(msg); scrollBottom();
  }

  function scrollBottom(){
    chatContainer.scrollTo({top:chatContainer.scrollHeight,behavior:'smooth'});
  }

  function escHtml(s){
    return s.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>')
            .replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
  }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

  <script type="module">
  import * as THREE from 'three';

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     COLOR BENDS  —  Vanilla JS port of the ReactBits component
     Original: https://www.reactbits.dev  (Three.js WebGL shader)
  ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function initColorBends() {

    const MAX_COLORS = 8;

    /* ── GLSL shaders (exact from ReactBits) ── */
    const VERT = `
      varying vec2 vUv;
      void main() {
        vUv = uv;
        gl_Position = vec4(position, 1.0);
      }
    `;

    const FRAG = `
      #define MAX_COLORS ${MAX_COLORS}
      uniform vec2  uCanvas;
      uniform float uTime;
      uniform float uSpeed;
      uniform vec2  uRot;
      uniform int   uColorCount;
      uniform vec3  uColors[MAX_COLORS];
      uniform int   uTransparent;
      uniform float uScale;
      uniform float uFrequency;
      uniform float uWarpStrength;
      uniform vec2  uPointer;
      uniform float uMouseInfluence;
      uniform float uParallax;
      uniform float uNoise;
      varying vec2 vUv;

      void main() {
        float t  = uTime * uSpeed;
        vec2  p  = vUv * 2.0 - 1.0;
        p += uPointer * uParallax * 0.1;
        vec2 rp = vec2(p.x*uRot.x - p.y*uRot.y, p.x*uRot.y + p.y*uRot.x);
        vec2 q  = vec2(rp.x*(uCanvas.x/uCanvas.y), rp.y);
        q /= max(uScale, 0.0001);
        q /= 0.5 + 0.2*dot(q,q);
        q += 0.2*cos(t) - 7.56;
        q += (uPointer - rp) * uMouseInfluence * 0.2;

        vec3  col   = vec3(0.0);
        float a     = 1.0;

        if (uColorCount > 0) {
          vec2  s      = q;
          vec3  sumCol = vec3(0.0);
          float cover  = 0.0;
          for (int i = 0; i < MAX_COLORS; ++i) {
            if (i >= uColorCount) break;
            s -= 0.01;
            vec2  r      = sin(1.5*(s.yx*uFrequency) + 2.0*cos(s*uFrequency));
            float m0     = length(r + sin(5.0*r.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(i))/4.0);
            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength,0.0,1.0);
            float kMix   = pow(kBelow,0.3);
            float gain   = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength-1.0,0.0);
            vec2  warped = s + (r-s)*kBelow*gain;
            float m1     = length(warped + sin(5.0*warped.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(i))/4.0);
            float m      = mix(m0,m1,kMix);
            float w      = 1.0 - exp(-6.0/exp(6.0*m));
            sumCol += uColors[i]*w;
            cover   = max(cover,w);

          col = clamp(sumCol,0.0,1.0);
          a   = uTransparent > 0 ? cover : 1.0;

          vec2 s = q;
          for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
            s -= 0.01;
            vec2  r      = sin(1.5*(s.yx*uFrequency) + 2.0*cos(s*uFrequency));
            float m0     = length(r + sin(5.0*r.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(k))/4.0);
            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength,0.0,1.0);
            float kMix   = pow(kBelow,0.3);
            float gain   = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength-1.0,0.0);
            vec2  warped = s + (r-s)*kBelow*gain;
            float m1     = length(warped + sin(5.0*warped.y*uFrequency - 3.0*t + float(k))/4.0);
            float m      = mix(m0,m1,kMix);
            col[k] = 1.0 - exp(-6.0/exp(6.0*m));
          }
          a = uTransparent > 0 ? max(max(col.r,col.g),col.b) : 1.0;
        }
